label: Run a long-horizon orchestration
describe: Turn the Claude Code main session into a long-horizon master orchestrator: build a task dependency graph, dispatch sub-tasks in parallel, and resume across compaction and restarts toward one large goal. Use when the goal is too big for a single session, needs parallel agents, or must survive >24h. This is an EXECUTE capability: it launches and coordinates real background work on the user's machine, so it requires explicit grant. Provide a clear `goal`; optionally cap parallelism and set a pacing budget. It composes lower-level cc-master capabilities (board create, agent dispatch, status) — granting this workflow implies you will also be asked for its members' grants.

goal.description: The long-horizon objective to orchestrate toward.

boardId.description: The orchestration board id to track/resume.

extras._note: Install is NOT an extras blob: cc-master's CapabilitySource.install() registers the Claude Code plugin (nemori-ai/cc-master) via the platform seam as a user-confirmed, audited action (source.install). scan() then surfaces this workflow AND its members (cc-master.board.create / agent.dispatch / board.status) so the members[] above resolve to present registry entries and the transitive grant has real targets.
